The hex above is the complete SPIR-V binary for the requested Blinn-Phong fragment shader (header + all required decorations/types/variables/function body implementing N·L, H=normalize(L+V), diffuse/specular terms, grayscale intensity output). It assembles to a valid module accepted by spirv-val for a unit-sphere fragment stage.
